project: AI Video Production Workspace GPT Bridge Line
title: WebGPT Post-Closeout Bridge Reality Audit
scope: inspect the existing WebGPT/MCP bridge implementation after R3-9 final video closeout
inventory v0 read-only, v0.5 draft, v1 human-confirmed pending action, v2 review assistant, and v3 production assistant surfaces
map existing bridge capabilities to the final_approved project state and R3-9 closeout evidence
identify gaps before any new GPT-facing implementation or official ChatGPT MCP app packaging
do not start public tunnels, call providers, read env files or credentials, mutate production truth, publish, deploy, push, tag, or release
goal: Recalibrate the GPT bridge line against the completed final video project so the next GPT-facing work starts from current app truth instead of stale R1 assumptions.
acceptance: Report includes current R1-0 through R1-5 completion status and evidence paths.
Report inventories package scripts and implemented bridge entrypoints for WebGPT v0, v0.5, v1, v2, and v3.
Report maps what GPT can read, draft, request, and propose after R3-9 final approval.
Report verifies final approved project evidence from R3-9R is reachable by app-side report references, not GPT-invented IDs.
Report identifies local blockers, stale assumptions, and recommended next tasks.

Report records public_tunnel_started=false, network_call_attempted=false, provider_called=false, env_files_read=false, credentials_read=false, production_truth_mutated=false, source_assets_overwritten=false, secret_values_exposed=false, publish_performed=false, release_or_deploy_performed=false.
validation: JSON parse for generated R1-6 audit report
boundary_or_safety_stop: audit only; no public tunnel, provider call, env or credential read, production mutation, publish, deploy, push, tag, or release
safe_actions_completed: Audited R1-0 through R1-5 completion status and evidence paths.
Inventoried WebGPT bridge v0, v0.5, v1, v2, and v3 package scripts, entrypoints, source surfaces, tests, tool lists, and safety flags.
Mapped bridge capabilities to R3-9R final-approved project evidence.
Ran npm run r1:6:audit, JSON parse check, npm run typecheck, WebGPT v0-v3 tests, npm run secret:scan, and git diff --check.
options_for_jenn: After R1-6, continue to R1-7 local bridge smoke validation if no blockers are found.
If official ChatGPT MCP packaging is desired, handle it as a separate security and docs decision after local bridge validation.
next_safe_option: Do not expose the bridge outside localhost or mutate production truth during the audit.
